original_image_tags: Scan of the back of a white, rectangular envelope, showing flap seams and four distinct circular ink stamps in reddish-purple ink. A small punched hole is visible on the far right edge.

elements.description: The back of a paper envelope with four circular magenta postal stamps. Three stamps clearly read 'WASHINGTON, D.C.' with the date 'APR 11 8 PM 1950' and the text 'SPECI DEL' at the bottom. A fourth, partially overlapping stamp is less legible but includes 'WASH' and 'APR 11 1950'.

judge.reason: Both sides agree on the back of an envelope with four circular magenta/reddish-purple stamps, but Description B adds specific quoted text and dates not present in Description A without contradicting it.
